cpSummary: Core audience: garden and patio users plus families with children who want to keep wasps off the dinner table during BBQ season, without electricity or chemicals. Secondary: allergy sufferers and buyers with a nearby wasp nest, often deploying pre-emptively in spring.

usageScenarios.label: Wasps at the dinner table / BBQ
usageScenarios.reason: Classic primary use case — summer dining outside without wasps.

usageScenarios.label: Protection in the garden / on the patio
usageScenarios.reason: All-day usable outdoor area without wasp harassment.

usageScenarios.label: When a wasp nest is nearby
usageScenarios.reason: Wasp nest spotted under the roof/in the shed — trap as an immediate measure.

usageScenarios.label: Fruit trees / fallen-fruit season
usageScenarios.reason: Ripe plums, pears or apples attract wasps in droves.

usageScenarios.label: Doorway / keeping the door clear
usageScenarios.reason: Keeping wasps away from the doorway so the door can safely stay open.

usageScenarios.label: Pre-emptive before the season
usageScenarios.reason: Catch queens in spring — prevents large colonies in summer.

csSummary: Across 329 reviews, bait selectivity dominates — many traps also attract bees and bumblebees. Secondary pain: bait dries out quickly and loses out to competing food sources nearby. Top praise: visible success (full trap), easy handling, and safety without electricity or chemicals.

negativeTopics.label: Doesn't catch wasps / ineffective
negativeTopics.reason: Top frustration: the trap is hanging there, but wasps fly around it and head straight for the food instead.
bullets: 14 of 134 negative reviews (10.4%) report ineffectiveness
Wasps fly around the trap and stay on the food — top complaint
Competing food sources nearby (fruit, BBQ) are underestimated
Expectation 'catches all wasps instantly' is rarely met
quotes: Not a single wasp was caught.
Our wasps seem to be too smart. I'm really disappointed. The attractant works quite well, but the wasps use the attractant and happily fly in and out.
Wasp trap not working as expected.
Disappointed. Absolutely bad product. 10 cm of wasp nest (under terrace floorboards) not a single one in the trap in 3 days. Fly

negativeTopics.label: Build quality / cleaning
negativeTopics.reason: Plastic breaks, trap leaks, emptying a full trap is gross and awkward.
bullets: 0.7% (1) with build or cleaning issues
Plastic parts break when opening or cleaning
Trap leaks — bait drips out
Emptying a full trap is gross and awkward
quotes: Delivered defective and no response to my defect report.

negativeInsights.finding: Sweet universal bait attracts everything with a sweet tooth — bees, bumblebees and flies die alongside. Top driver of 1-star reviews from animal-loving and eco-conscious customers.
negativeInsights.implication: Develop and communicate a selective bait (protein-based in late summer, pheromone-based) as a USP. 'Bee-friendly' is a selling bullet, not just a compliance detail.

negativeInsights.finding: Bait dries out in 3–5 days in summer heat — buyers feel forced to keep buying refills or the trap stops working.
negativeInsights.implication: Evaporation protection (lid, reservoir, capsule) as a design feature. Including refill sachets (at least 3) significantly raises first-purchase satisfaction.

negativeInsights.finding: Wasps prefer the BBQ, the ice cream, the fallen fruit — the trap loses the bait competition against real food 2m away.
negativeInsights.implication: Listing must communicate 'place at least 3–5m from the dining table' as the primary usage instruction. Education > product promise. A+ module with placement diagram.

negativeInsights.finding: Emptying a full trap of drowned wasps is gross and a top complaint for reusable models — disposable models avoid it but are ecologically problematic.
negativeInsights.implication: 'No-touch' emptying (bottom flap, pull-out insert) is a clear differentiator. Show it in the hero image or video.

negativeInsights.finding: Sweet-rotten bait smell bothers people too — especially at the dining table, where the trap is supposed to protect guests.
negativeInsights.implication: Odour-neutral or pheromone-based baits as a premium variant. Reinforce the 'place away from seating' instruction.

negativeInsights.finding: Trap blows over in wind, plastic yellows and turns brittle after one season — durability promise often not kept.
negativeInsights.implication: UV-stabilised material plus mounting kit (carabiner, steel hook) in the box. A clear 2-season warranty would sharply cut negative reviews.

positiveTopics.label: Catches lots of wasps
positiveTopics.reason: Trap full of wasps within hours — visible success is instantly convincing.
bullets: 8 of 159 positive reviews (5.0%) praise the effectiveness
Full of wasps within hours — visible proof
Major reduction at the dinner table / in the garden
Finally able to sit outside undisturbed again
quotes: good attractant, after a short time the container is full of wasps
should hang it up well. If goes in their direction of flight. Works great
It catches a lot of wasps and flies and is of course uninteresting for bees, there was no wine in it.
I've been ordering for years, works great!

positiveTopics.label: Durable & reusable
positiveTopics.reason: Bell-/reusable traps last multiple seasons — plastic stays sturdy.
bullets: 1 (0.6%) report long lifespan
Bell-/reusable traps last multiple seasons
Plastic stays sturdy and doesn't break
Reusable is more sustainable than disposable bags
quotes: I've been ordering for years, works great!

positiveTopics.label: Perfect for garden/patio
positiveTopics.reason: Classic outdoor use — the garden or patio becomes usable again.
bullets: 0.6% (1) use it in the garden/on the patio
Classic outdoor use dominates
Garden/patio becomes usable again
Also at the pool or in the allotment
quotes: I've already bought replacement bait because the wasps seem to fly on it and since then I've been able to eat outside in peace without being surrounded by wasps!

positiveInsights.finding: SWISSINNO dominates the DE Lure segment — buyers explicitly choose it for the Swiss quality promise, even at a higher price.
positiveInsights.implication: Brand story (Swiss manufacturer, R&D, conservation) prominent in the A+ module. Private-label competitors must either undercut clearly or build a strong alternative narrative.

positiveInsights.finding: 'Finally undisturbed BBQs again' is the most emotional trigger in positive reviews — stronger than generic 'garden'.
positiveInsights.implication: Hero image and video should show a BBQ scene, not a generic garden. Bundle offer at BBQ-season start (April/May).

positiveInsights.finding: 'Full of wasps within hours' is the biggest wow moment — buyers photograph full traps and share them in reviews.
positiveInsights.implication: Actively push a UGC campaign 'show your full trap'. Listing hero image should show a real full trap, not a stock photo.

positiveInsights.finding: Buyers prefer traps that don't look industrial — bell shapes and discreet colours win over bright-red plastic bags.
positiveInsights.implication: Premium variant in glass, ceramic or wood-look finish. Colour options (garden green, anthracite, white) as variants.

positiveInsights.finding: 'No poison, no electricity' is a clear advantage over electric zappers — parents and pet owners deliberately choose Lure.
positiveInsights.implication: Cross-listing strategy: differentiate from electric alternatives directly in listing images. 'Safe for kids, dogs, cats' in the first bullet.

positiveInsights.finding: Reusable traps last multiple seasons — buyers come back for refill bait but have to search actively.
positiveInsights.implication: Refill subscription (season start + mid-summer) via Subscribe-and-Save. Cross-sell insert in the original trap packaging.

buyersMotivation.label: Finally sitting outside undisturbed
buyersMotivation.reason: Pain-driven purchase after a summer with a wasp plague at the dinner table.

buyersMotivation.label: Protecting family/kids from stings
buyersMotivation.reason: Toddlers and fear of wasp stings — emotional trigger.

buyersMotivation.label: Allergy protection
buyersMotivation.reason: Wasp-sting allergy sufferers buy prophylactically and repeatedly.

buyersMotivation.label: Alternative to electricity/chemicals
buyersMotivation.reason: Conscious buyers want neither insecticides nor electric devices.

buyersMotivation.label: Saving BBQ evenings
buyersMotivation.reason: BBQ evenings specifically should be undisturbed again.

buyersMotivation.label: Decorative solution instead of industrial look
buyersMotivation.reason: Trap hangs visibly — looks should fit the garden.

customerExpectations.label: Actually catches wasps
customerExpectations.reason: Top expectation — if it says 'wasp trap', wasps should actually be inside.

customerExpectations.label: Spares bees & beneficials
customerExpectations.reason: Selectivity is increasingly expected — even by non-beekeeper customers.

customerExpectations.label: Bait lasts at least 2 weeks
customerExpectations.reason: Anyone who has to refill every 3 days feels misled.

customerExpectations.label: Easy, gross-free cleaning
customerExpectations.reason: No-touch emptying is now expected as standard.

customerExpectations.label: Weatherproof for the whole season
customerExpectations.reason: Trap should survive summer without becoming brittle or faded.

customerExpectations.label: Safe for kids & pets
customerExpectations.reason: No poison, no exposed wires, securely mounted.

themeFilters.label: Bait dries out / evaporates too fast
Too expensive for what you get

reviews.t: Unfortunately without success. I tried the wasp trap in different places. Even hung 40 cm from the entrance of the wasp nest. The wasps don't care in the slightest. Not a single wasp was caught in 4 days and several hundred fly past it every day. I mean the wasps all give me the wrong finger and fly past the trap

Ineffective. I have always been very satisfied with Swissino products - but in this case the lure is completely ineffective. Has the recipe been changed? If so - pretty bad idea! If not - hmm, then we probably have very picky wasps this year
doesn't work. I hung the trap about 1 meter from 5 wasp nests, not a single wasp is interested in it. Unfortunately it was unusable for me and therefore not recommended
Disappointed. Absolutely bad product. 10 cm of wasp nest (under terrace floorboards) not a single one in the trap in 3 days. Fly past quietly

Doesn't work. Set up at 5:00 p.m., dismantled at 9:00 p.m., wasps that flew in: 0, wasps that flew past: approx. 200, of which with a laugh: approx. 75, of which with a stinky finger: approx. 50, the rest tried to eat 2 pork schnitzels and 4 sausages from the grill. Annoyed, we moved inside. They don't seem to care about the attractant. Next time I'll light coffee powder again, which doesn't help 100%, but at least it annoys the stupid creatures a lot

Not a single wasp caught. I set up the product - as described - about 1.0 m away from an incipient wasp nest, i.e. they flew past it constantly, but not a single one felt attracted. Although I usually always use organic products, I had to use a conventional product and was able to get the wasp infestation under control! It's a shame I spent money on this for nothing

A joke, not recommended. It has been in operation since yesterday and most of the liquid supplied for mixing has already been consumed by the wasps. Not a single wasp was caught. The flies all get into the container, slurp up the liquid and escape again through the opening! This product is an absolute joke. Not recommended

HORNETS, cockchafers and flies. Unfortunately, this product has nothing to do with a wasp trap! Under a mountain of flies there are some cockchafers and unfortunately also the protected HORNET!...The frame is ok, but the "attractant" is probably only suitable for wasps in Switzerland....The contents have been emptied and are being filled with another attractant

The wasps should like it. It has been on the terrace for 3 days, wasps fly up to the opening, sit down and fly away again. Lots of wasps all around. None have been flown in so far. The current comment, unfortunately it hasn't helped us so far

It's no good, stay away! The joke is that 90% of the wasps fly out again! I used Decifix to seal up the two outer holes in the tube, but unfortunately around 80% of the wasps still fly out again. Absolutely bad construction!
Doesn't work. Our wasps seem to be too smart. I'm really disappointed. The attractant works quite well, but the wasps use the attractant and happily fly in and out
Wasp trap not working as expected. Unfortunately the wasp trap didn't do what was described. We didn't catch a single wasp. For this reason I can unfortunately only give this rating

3 traps, 7 days, 2 wasps. The concept doesn't work. After receipt, 3 traps were filled and placed according to the instructions.... 7 days later there were only 2 wasps (totally!!!) in the traps. Wasted money!!!
Our wasps were totally unimpressed.... Unfortunately our wasps didn't care at all and the remedy was ignored. It's a shame, money wasted. Putting out a bottle of lemonade will do more
Delivered defective and no response to my defect report. The wasp trap was delivered defective. I have already contacted the delivery company twice - no response!
Not a single wasp caught. The title says it all... although wasps always fly past the spot, not a single one fell into the trap. Therefore no purchase recommendation
Makes no sense at all!!. That doesn't help at all, our gable and balcony are covered with wood and they're still coming. Sitting just a few centimeters next to the middle. Every great spray does more
Doesn't work. We had a plague of vesps in the house, 100s of vesps in one room. 3 in the trap. In my opinion the attractant didn't work
It is a crime to kill wasps! Do you know that wasps are protected by nature and that it is a criminal offense to kill wasps? ‼️
Inutile. Inutile. Prato pieno di vespe, messo come da istruzioni, due giorni nessuna cattura. Totally inutile
Non functional. Non ha catturato assolutamente nulla.....meglio il mio artigianale e mi costa meno
Insoddisfatto. In 10 days without having to drive a Vespa, the car was almost completely broken in the same day
Non functional. Prodotto inefficace, the stresse trappole riempite with the birra catturavano più insetti, with this proprio niente!

Wasp trap?? Grave of flies!! Fast delivery, easy assembly. Strong plastic smell. The worst: hung directly in the flight path of the wasps: nothing! As someone has already written, I heard the wasps laughing loudly as they flew by. To be fair, I left it hanging for a week... and they're still laughing... but the thing catches flies wonderfully. If you have fly problems, definitely buy it, otherwise you'll be wasting money!
Bait NOT included. did not include natural bait as title indicates
Too bad. My wasps just ignore it

No entra ni una just avispa. The estaba esperando como agua de Mayo, lo coloqué según llego this mañana y después de todo el día rodeado de cientos de avispas no ha caído ninguna. He is always watching and is interested in what he wants to do with the ceiling, but he also has a repellent more than that, with all the warnings that he has and the races that are difficult to achieve DINERO

Product inefficace, escroquerie sur la quality. j'utilise ce product depuis trois saisons. Jusqu'à l'été 2017, the sentait le jus de prune fermentée and était assez efficace. Depuis fin 2017, the manufacturer a dû changer the composition of the product: the n'a plus d'odeur, the water is colored slightly and it is ineffective. N'attire que des mouches!. Extrêmement déçu par ce product ! A second time after the installation, there is no attraction to the shape of the eyes. The inverse, the mélange grenadine/eau/vinaigre que j'ai mis dans an attrape guêpe similaire, positionné à 1 mètre de celui with the "appât" professional" an attrapé a trentaine de guêpes et 2 frelons.Faites un mélange ça fonctionne mieux!

Joke item for wasps. The bait seems to be totally unsuitable for wasps! Positioned directly in front of the wasp nest for 7 days, no wasp in the trap!!! I think the wasps are sitting on the trap and laughing at me!!! Total waste of money!!! This plastic cup with no use is going back!

feeding station. The wasp trap is a complete failure. The wasps fly into the can and drink their fill of the bait. Then they crawl out of the can again. People would rather buy Raid and spray it selectively on wasps, but this is an absolute misconstruction

Zero effect! Unfortunately, I didn't have a good experience! Apart from a few flies, none of the flies fell into the trap in 3 weeks. You can save the money for this alleged wasp trap, as this product has no attraction for creatures
It's disesperant. Cada this time I'm looking for something to buy on Amazon with the facility of entry and storage. The product is not absolutely absolute for anything

No more than 10 notices per month. Pensaba que algo haría, ya que tengo una plaga de avisperos cerca de la piscina this year, pero vamos... no ha entrado ni una. Solo ha cazado 4 hormigas que no se como han podido llegar ahí y una mosca :-(

Atrapa nada. No me has funcionado para nada!!Ni una sola avispa, y mira que las que tengo son facilonas.Es más fácil les cuente una mentira una mentira las avispas para que entren en la trampa que se sobran atraídas por este producto.Dinero tirado

No sirve. Solo han ido hormigas. No ha caido ni una just abeja or avispa. He tirado el dinero. Como trampa sirve...si...pero para que los compradores tiremos el dinero, en ningún caso para las avispas que están a cientos en mi piscina se digne al menos 1 a entrar. Nunca mas
Failed practical test. The meager yield after 2.5 days: 1 wasp and 2 flies - and that 1m away from a wasp flight path. I would say any drink or any leftover food is more effective

No vale un duro. No vale un duro. Llegó q se le caían las letras negras del bote y se te quedaban pegadas en la manos y a parte llevo dos días la trampa puesta y no entra ni una avispa es una porquería de cebo

Acune efficacité. Maleureusement ce product no functionne pas du tout. Also there is no room in the interior of the 10th century, close to déjeune (the chicken or the jambon) that are adoring

No fincionó. Tengo muchas advice in the garden. Compré unas trampas y este cebo, pero las avispas mo entraban en las trampas. Puse restos de comida en las trampas y las avispas entraron. Luego, the cebo does not function in absolute terms
ZERO. If you choose to have positive commentaries, you will also find insects that are freely active in the pool in the majority of the pools, but not in the fairest places

Rubbish. Waste of money. Bought to place in wasp/bee trap and all its attracted is thousands of ants! Not one wasp or bee!

effective wasp trap. In this wasp plague year, each of our three traps is full of wasps every three days. There are also a few forest cockroaches and blow flies and that's great. The bait liquid provided needs to be improved, but it can be done easily. In a large empty pickle jar I mix the contents of a bait bag with a 500 ml bottle of cheap apple juice, 2 spoons of sugar, 1 teaspoon of vinegar. Then add three squirts of dishwashing detergent at the end so that the liquid has no surface tension and the wasps...

Super efficace à condition d'avoir du soleil. Utilize the côté d'une terrasse il faut bien respecter the notice: éloigner le piège du lieu où l'on se trouve (5-10 mètres) et surtout bien l'exposer au soleil.J'ai fait le test: les 2 premiers jours un temps assezz gris, result: 3 mouches Capturées.Puis les 7 jours suivants plein soleil qui donne directement dessus et la efficacité maximum: au moins une trentaine de guêpes et une dizaine de mouche !Il n'existe pas de formule miracle (à ma connaissance !) pour un repas guaranty without aucune guêpes dehors dans nos régions mais cela limite grand...

Protect the bees and only kill wasps as it should be! It catches a lot of wasps and flies and is of course uninteresting for bees, there was no wine in it. I have a nest in the roller shutter and had all the liquid full of probably 50 wasps after a day. With refills I got rid of the entire nest on the house. Now I just have to remove it, but nothing is flying in and out anymore, which was extreme before. Nest is so big that the roller shutter is stuck. (New House)

Best attractant there is. Best attractant there is. I hung 8 of these traps 6 weeks ago and they are full every other day. Not just with wasps but also with flies. Luckily bees don't go in. It's because of the vinegar smell. Since replacing the attractant is too expensive for me in the long run, I have now ordered the one from Neudorff and have just filled the traps with it. I'm curious to see how good it is

Perfect bait for wasp traps. I always use the wasp trap in combination with this bait and I'm more than thrilled, it's great to use, doesn't stick and doesn't smell. Unfortunately, the last delivery didn't quite work BUT the service was great and very friendly. I will order here again

Very good effect. I hung the trap around 1m from the nest in the roof gable and after around 5 days there were tons of wasps in the trap, the attractant was already gone. But the bait (attractant) is too expensive for me to reorder and I'm going to try it today with my own mixture

impressive. This is - in my opinion - the only product that works. In the summer of 2013 (that was a wasp year with a real epidemic) we caught more than 200 wasps within 4 hours (with 2 containers). Which is why wasps sometimes don't fly directly to the container. This is because they are scouts who, as experience has shown, do not pounce on the prey immediately, but fly off again to inform the other animals about the food source. You also need a little patience, because the liquid has to ferment a little before it is fully...

Totally effective. Hemos conseguido captured in 1 week of installation and 2 trampas with 100 avispas asiaticas in cada trampa. Hemos adquirido mas trampas and mas liquido. Las trampas tambien han sido muy eficaces. The liquid contains vinagre that ahuyenta a las abejas evitando que los polinizadores caigan en la trampa. Great efficiency and with a high level of efficiency. Muy buen producto y evita cometer errors in the fabrication of the mismo.

ALTAMENTE EFECTIVO. Utilizado a plena satisfaction durante los 3 ultimos veranos, en mi caso ha más que cubierto las expectativas del producto.Desplegando 4 trampas (obviamente del mismo fabricante) ha atrapado alrededor de 20 or 30 avispas diariamente (en cada una de ellas !), the hecho he debido Vaciarlas y sustituirlas antes del tiempo previsto por la saturación de avispas existente en su interior.Muy importante probar en diferentes ubicaciones para optimizar the efectividad del producto (por ejemplo en zones with sombra prácticamente no atrapó ninguna avispa, por contra en plena exposure...
Without fear of sting (allergic to wasp venom). Very effective. We bought two of them and are totally satisfied. You can finally relax on the terrace

Piege a guepes au top. Malgré les appréciations un peu septique après avoir essayé beaucoup de produits autour de la piscine étant allergique this année je ne pouvais plus approcher ma terrasse j ai donc acheter ce pot avec le produit fourni c est génial première journée au top au bout d une semaine le pot This rempli de guêpe et frelon énorme des mouches mais aucune abeille ce qui est tres bien j'en suis ravie et enfin la solution à nos soucis de guepes au bord de l eau été tranquilles je le conseil fortement surtout pour les personnes allergies en plus le produit ce vend seul après

Extraordinaire. Produit conforme à la description , livré avec un sachet d'appât hyper efficace.En deux jours seulement , je ne voyais déjà plus de liquide tellement d'insectes étaient pris au piège. Il a fallu que j'attende la fraîcheur du matin pour vider-filter son content afin de refaire de la place pour d'autres indésirables. Il a surtout attrapé des mouches et des guêpes ainsi quelques frelons.Tellement efficace que j'en ai recommandé deux pour les mettre dans la maison , pour les mouches.Et j'ai commandé en supplément , des appâts du même fabriquant
Helps. When hung a little away from the dining table, you can finally eat undisturbed again
Works. I've been ordering for years, works great!

I'm thrilled!!! I was a little skeptical when I ordered, but I quickly learned better! As soon as it was attached to the bush, the first wasp was inside. 3 days later the trap was full. The same thing happened with the second filling. I've already bought replacement bait because the wasps seem to fly on it and since then I've been able to eat outside in peace without being surrounded by wasps! The money is definitely worth it!!!

Functions!. I saw this trap in use in a beer garden and it seems to work great. There were about 10 traps laid out and they were all jam-packed. A waiter laid out a new trap and within ten minutes four wasps were inside. I noticed from the other reviews that it doesn't seem to work that well on the grill. Maybe it's the bait

Très efficace!. Piège très efficace! This is a very high level of food in my garden and it is decided to have the piège. Je ne suis pas déçu! Il fonctionne très bien! The attractiveness of the food, on a tranquil setting on the terrace! If you can find a negative point, you will have a long time on the net, but there is a grave in it!

The best attractant we have ever used! I have already written a detailed review of the wasp trap. The attractant itself is simply brilliant, it actually only attracts wasps. After almost a week and using the liquid attractant several times, after skimming it and refilling it, we can also say that the effect seems to last for several days. We didn't have a single unwanted bycatch, neither bees, bumblebees nor flies, all we caught were wasps. It's important to know that when filling it in Absolutely no deep breathing...

Works perfectly. After four days of use, I'm thrilled. The attractant works excellently, as does the Swissinno trap itself. Apart from a few big flies, there is no bycatch. Hornets also find their way out of the trap

Funciona bien. A ver el producto es caro, lo compré así para bar ver si funciona bien o es un engañabobos, ya que comprar a bidón de 5L para que no funcione es una tontería.El caso es que my father tiene algunos enjambres de abejas por la zone de la granja de los abuelos, que las mantienen desde el visabuelo, y desde han llegado las avispas asiáticas están desapareciendo todas las pobres abejas... Así que se me ocurrió probar esto.Lo colocamos a principio de abril, porque nos recomendaron esperar a esa època, ya que empiezan a salir más porque va llegando el calor. Primero pareció...

Super efficace, this année je peux enfin récolter du raisin!. Accroché sous un arbre à proximité de vignes et de la maison. You can use the dishes, fronds and mouthpieces in 1 to 2 weeks. On the photo, on the bird's eye view, after 6 days, in October, there were a few insects. The other years the Frelons dévoraient le raisin, maintenant ils directement dans le piège.Le produit fourni is super efficace, mais du coup il faut le replacer souvent, à moins de vouloir filtrer the bouillie d'insectes. After various essays, you can use the mélange suivant: a demi cuillère à café de...
Bomb. Not cheap but worth it. After a week all the bees were eliminated. Set up on the apple tree and at that time the container was half full with annoying insects

Brilliant, in all cases used with the piece of the same brand. There is a place for 2 pieces conforming to the instructions in my small garden in the town of Nice. It is available with beautiful flowers (oranges, glycine) and with beautiful flowers, mais with sometimes retrouvées mortes sans pollen au pattes.
